entities.name: PEANUT
entities.description: The primary crop being improved for high oleic acid content

entities.name: HIGH OLEIC ACID
entities.description: A trait characterized by high oleic acid concentration (80+2%) providing shelf-life and health benefits

entities.name: SHELF-LIFE
entities.description: The duration for which the peanut remains fit for consumption, improved by high oleic acid

entities.name: FOOD PROCESSING INDUSTRY
entities.description: The industrial sector that benefits from the longer shelf-life of high oleic peanuts

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, the organization leading the development

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A primary location for the development, testing, and planned release of high oleic peanut varieties

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A target region for the cultivation of high oleic peanuts

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A target region for the cultivation of high oleic peanuts

entities.name: SPANISH
entities.description: A specific growth habit of the developed high oleic peanut lines

entities.name: VIRGINIA BUNCH
entities.description: A specific growth habit of the developed high oleic peanut lines

entities.name: SUNOLEIC 95R
entities.description: The donor parent from the USA used to introduce the high oleic trait

entities.name: USA
entities.description: The country of origin for the donor parent SunOleic 95R

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding approach using genetic markers to select for the high oleic trait

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding approach using genetic markers to introgress the high oleic trait into target backgrounds

entities.name: NEAR INFRARED REFLECTANCE SPECTROSCOPY
entities.description: A high-throughput phenotyping method used to measure oleic acid concentration

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of the peanut lines

entities.name: RAPID GENERATION ADVANCEMENT
entities.description: A technique used to accelerate the breeding cycle

entities.name: CONTROLLED CONDITIONS
entities.description: The environment used to facilitate rapid generation advancement

entities.name: TARGET SITE TESTING
entities.description: A testing approach used to fix the best allele combinations

entities.name: MULTI-LOCATION TESTING
entities.description: The process of testing peanut lines across various locations to ensure stability and performance

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average value of the high oleic trait over generations

entities.name: UGANDA
entities.description: A partner country that received high oleic peanut lines

entities.name: TANZANIA
entities.description: A partner country that received high oleic peanut lines

entities.name: MALI
entities.description: A partner country that received high oleic peanut lines

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: A partner country that received high oleic peanut lines

entities.description: A partner country that received high oleic peanut lines

entities.description: A partner country that received high oleic peanut lines

entities.name: MYANMAR
entities.description: A partner country that received high oleic peanut lines

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: A partner country that received high oleic peanut lines

entities.name: AICRP-G
entities.description: All India Co-ordinated Research Project on Peanut, the body conducting national trials in India
